task_completion.description: Add a boolean field labeled 'Clearance Item' to the Default Product type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Manage fields' page for the Default Product type showing 'Clearance Item' (machine name: field_clearance) of type Boolean.

task_completion.description: Set the Clearance Item flag to True for the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the product edit form for 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' with the 'Clearance Item' checkbox checked, or a success message indicating the product was updated.

task_completion.description: Set the Clearance Item flag to True for the 'Logitech MX Master 3S' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the product edit form for the Logitech MX Master 3S (or Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse) with the 'Clearance Item' checkbox checked, or a success message indicating the product was updated.

task_completion.description: Create a View page at path '/clearance' that filters for products with the Clearance Item flag enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Views configuration UI showing a Page display with the path '/clearance' and a Filter Criterion for the 'Clearance Item' field set to True (= 1).

task_completion.description: Add a 'Clearance' menu link to the Main navigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Main navigation menu configuration showing a 'Clearance' link, or the frontend of the store showing 'Clearance' in the main header navigation.

integrity.description: Agent used the Drupal web interface rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating and filling out forms in the Drupal admin UI (e.g., Manage Fields, Views UI) rather than executing drush or SQL commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely submitted forms to create the field, view, and update products.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Drupal success messages (green banners) such as 'Saved the Clearance Item configuration', 'The view Clearance has been saved', or 'Product ... has been updated'.

integrity.description: Results are from actual configuration, not DOM manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL matches the expected Drupal admin paths for the actions being performed, and there is no evidence of browser developer tools being used to fake the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected machine name for the boolean field is 'field_clearance'. The expected path for the View page is '/clearance'. The verified target product to be updated is 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones'. Note: The task description mentions 'Logitech MX Master 3S', but the actual seeded product in the environment is named 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'; accept either as long as the clearance flag is set on the Logitech product.
